body_txt: Many would think Reptiles Are Abhorrent or Spiders Are Scary , but not little Bobby! Whether it be creepy insects, furry arachnids, scaly reptiles, or similar critters, he thinks they're just the coolest things on the planet. You're a wuss if you don't agree with him. The morality of said boy (or tomboy ) often varies. He may just be an innocent everyday kid who loves his bearded dragon and thinks green bugs are cool, or an Enfant Terrible who feeds his snake cute living mice for his own amusement . Either way, expect Bob to try to taunt girls with the wild lizard he found near the pond to gross them out or scare them, though amphibians like wart-covered toads can take that role, too. May be the reason why a boy is a Friend to Bugs . Also related to Slime, Snails, and Mutant Tails , for when toys are marketed towards boys with things like "green slime" and "gross oozing". Compare Nightmare Fetishist . See also Freaky Is Cool , Kids Love Dinosaurs . The Spear Counterpart to All Girls Like Ponies .
